title: Analyst Forecasts Just Became More Bearish On Editas Medicine, Inc.
text: Analyst forecasts for Editas Medicine have become more bearish as consensus estimates were revised downward following the company's strategic restructuring announcement. Over the past 3 months, 5 analysts published their opinion on Editas Medicine stock. These analysts are typically employed by large Wall Street banks and tasked with understanding company business to predict how stock will trade over upcoming year. The 25 Wall Street analysts covering the stock overall have established consensus rating of Buy based on 14 Buy, 9 Hold, 2 Sell ratings. Consensus price target of $9.15 based on ratings of 23 analysts, though more recent data suggests average price target is 5.77 USD among 20 analysts following the workforce reduction announcement and reni-cel discontinuation. Some analysts remain bullish with HC Wainwright maintaining buy rating and B of A Securities raising price target to $15 on August 8, 2024. However downgrades and cautious sentiment reflect concerns about execution risks and revenue forecast reductions stemming from loss of reni-cel program.
